case_title: BEAN RANDOLPH DELMON VS. CHANG JUN YUAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,335.00 FILED BY DELMON, BEAN RANDOLPH AS TO DEFENDANT YUAN, CHANG JUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $140.00) SERVED JUN-03-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YUAN, CHANG JUN
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-01-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-01-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH THE PLAINTIFF AND THE DEFENDANT. CLERK: A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-01-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELMON, BEAN RANDOLPH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YUAN, CHANG JUN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
